description_long: This is a three-story brick house with a prominent black hip roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a central entryway with a small overhanging structure, flanked by large rectangular windows arranged in neat rows. On one side, a blue awning shades a balcony, while the opposite side has a white-railed balcony above a secondary entrance. Mature trees and shrubs are positioned at the corners, adding greenery to the urban setting. The rear of the house includes a garage door and more windows, maintaining the regular window pattern. The overall design is utilitarian with minimal ornamentation, reflecting a blend of traditional and modern urban residential styles.
description: A three-story brick house with a black hip roof, symmetrical windows, balconies, and a central entryway, surrounded by trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with a small overhanging structure, symmetrical windows, and trees on both sides.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a blue awning over a balcony and a large tree partially obscuring the facade.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a garage door at the base, regular window rows, and less landscaping.
description_view_3: This side view features a white-railed balcony above a secondary entrance and a tree at the corner.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a small overhanging structure, flanked by windows and minimal decorative elements.
